description: Gliding simian folk with patagial wing-flaps, crewing spelljammer ships as natural-born riggers.
subraces: Rope-swinging sailors scampering up masts and patching hulls faster than any groundling crew.
Thrill-seeking scouts gliding into uncharted territory and mapping new worlds firsthand.
Shrewd barterers plying the spacelanes, exchanging exotic goods between crystal spheres.
